pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-010 (TF, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3780 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.378, dcwf=0.377, ddat=0.373) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3780 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does TF-domain KSA TF-S-010 (composite 0.3780) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3780 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Geospatial Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.3780 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3780, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
